mapper.select: SELECT id, hospitalization_id, record_date, condition_desc, treatment_plan FROM hospitalization_record
SELECT id, hospitalization_id, record_date, condition_desc, treatment_plan FROM hospitalization_record WHERE hospitalization_id = #{hospitalizationId} ORDER BY record_date
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hospitalization_record (hospitalization_id, record_date, condition_desc, treatment_plan) VALUES (#{hospitalizationId}, #{recordDate}, #{conditionDesc}, #{treatmentPlan})
